name: Indonesian Steak with Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss the onions, garlic, coriander, salt, and both types of pepper.
2. Add lemon juice, brown sugar, and soy sauce to the mixture; stir until well combined.
3. Place the chuck steak into the marinade and refrigerate overnight.
4. Preheat broiler pan or rack to the farthest position from the flame.
5. Place the meat on the preheated broiler pan or rack.
6. Broil for 12 minutes.
7. Remove the meat from the broiler and brush with the remaining marinade.
8. Continue broiling for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Serve 6 portions.
